title: Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star
description: Twinkle, Twinkle, Little Star melody reference imported from a Kuailepu detail page and normalized into the current lightweight ocarina-tab renderer. Source composer field: 莫扎特.
alignedLyrics: Twin- kle twin- kle lit- tle star,
how I won- der what you are.
up a- bove the world so high,
like a dia- mond in the sky.
Twin- kle twin- kle lit- tle star,
how I won- der what you are.
